description:
Implement `hx-popover` (T2 tier) — 4/6 enterprise libraries ship this. Rich floating overlay attached to a trigger element.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-popover/`:
- `index.ts`, `hx-popover.ts`, `hx-popover.styles.ts`, `hx-popover.stories.ts`, `hx-popover.test.ts`

**Props:** `open` (boolean), `placement` (top/right/bottom/left + start/end variants — 12 total), `trigger` (`click`|`hover`|`focus`|`manual`), `distance` (px offset from anchor), `skidding` (alignment offset), `arrow` (boolean — show arrow pointing to anchor)

**Slots:** `anchor` (the trigger element), default (popover content)

**Events:** `hx-show`, `hx-after-show`, `hx-hide`, `hx-after-hide`

**CSS Parts:** `arrow`, `body`

**ARIA:** `role="dialog"` when interactive content, `role="tooltip"` when text-only. `aria-expanded` on trigger. Escape key closes.

**Positioning:** Use the Floating UI algorithm (`@floating-ui/dom` if available, or manual positioning). Flip to avoid viewport overflow. Arrow points to anchor with correct rotation per placement.

**Study:** `hx-tooltip` for the floating positioning pattern — popover extends it with richer content and click trigger.

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests (open/close, keyboard, placement flipping), axe-core zero violations, Storybook all placements + triggers, bundle < 5KB.

Register in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-popover — T2 Floating Popover
